app.name: MeyasuAt
app.tagline: A Bluesky message box for short notes, long thoughts, and images
app.description: A free message box service for Bluesky users to receive anonymous long messages and images
signin.title: Sign in
signin.description: Sign in to set up your message box
oauth.callback.error: Sign in failed. Please try again.
submit.title: 's {box}
submit.body_placeholder: Send an anonymous message (up to 1000 characters)
submit.named_signin_description: Sign in to send a message with your Bluesky handle to {name}
submit.named_checkbox: Send with your Bluesky handle to {name}
submit.error.too_long: Message must be 1000 characters or less
submit.error.too_many_images: You can attach up to 4 images
submit.error.image_too_large: Each image must be 1MB or less
submit.error.storage_limit: Image storage is currently at capacity. Please try again later.
submit.error.rate_limit: Too many messages. Please wait before sending again.
dashboard.title: Meyasubako
dashboard.empty_sub: Share your {box} URL to get started
dashboard.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.hide_question_confirm: Hide this question from your inbox? You cannot undo this later.
dashboard.delete_question_confirm: Delete this question? It will disappear from Sent Questions.
dashboard.delete_answer_confirm: Delete this answer? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.delete_error: Failed to delete. Please try again.
dashboard.delete_error.pds_conflict: The record still exists on PDS. Please wait a moment and try again.
dashboard.delete_error.pds_verify_failed: Failed to verify PDS status. Please try again in a moment.
settings.title: Settings
settings.box_name_description: Shown to people sending you messages. Leave blank to use the default "Meyasubako".
settings.notify_enabled: Notify me on Bluesky when I receive a message
settings.notify_description: Turning this on will automatically follow the meyasuat-atto bot. You'll receive a mention from that bot when you get a message.
message.answer_error.too_long: Answer must be 1000 characters or less
message.images_expired: Images were deleted after the retention period (90 days).
landing.hero_title: A Bluesky message box for short notes, long thoughts, and images
landing.hero_sub: MeyasuAt is an AT Protocol message box for receiving anonymous messages without requiring senders to sign in. People can send quick notes, longer thoughts, and image-backed messages.
landing.feature5: Get notified on Bluesky when answers arrive
landing.feature_note: * Signed-in users store question and answer data in their PDS.
landing.how1_desc: Sign in with Bluesky to get your own message box URL.
landing.how2_desc: Add it to your profile or posts. Senders can write without signing in.
landing.how3_desc: Reply to long or image-backed messages and share them with rich OGP cards.
not_found.title: Not found
about.title: About MeyasuAt
about.lead: MeyasuAt is a free question box service that anyone with a Bluesky account can use.
about.feature1: Receive anonymous messages up to 1000 characters.
about.feature2: Senders can include images with their messages.
about.feature3: Signed-in senders can also include their Bluesky handle.
about.feature4: When you answer a message, you can share it clearly on Bluesky or X.
about.notice1_prefix: This app is developed and operated as a personal hobby project by
about.notice2: Because this is an individual project, support may be limited and the service may end without advance notice.
about.notice3: This app also stores question and answer data in its own database.
about.notice_conduct: Please do not post messages or images that violate public order or standards of decency.
about.notice5: Attachments on anonymous questions may be deleted around 90 days after they are saved.
about.disclaimer: We assume no responsibility for any damages arising from the use of this app.
about.notice4: The text on this page may change without advance notice.
